response.overview: This new season begins with the story of Melur (Anna Jobling) and Firdaus (Meerqeen)'s household, which has now returned to happiness. Both of them want to strengthen their relationship but they are constantly facing various obstacles in seeking happiness. Moreover, Firdaus is forced to handle a company project in the countryside, causing him to be busy with work and spending a lot of time with his coworker Mawar (Eyka Farhana). Melur is excited to develop her career in the world of children's book writing. In an effort to open a children's novel publishing company, her business partner Zackery (Azim Yusof) secretly harbors feelings for Melur. At the same time, Lili and her son Damia are now living more peacefully after her husband Zain was imprisoned. However, when Zain is released from prison, Lili begins to feel anxious because of the trauma from Zain's act of beating her. Melur persuades Lili to pray so that Zain will repent and change his ways.
response.title: Melur Untuk Firdaus 2
